com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.serialport

Class SerialPortSettings

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.serialport.SerialPortSettings
  • Direct Known Subclasses:
    UART3Config

    public class SerialPortSettings
extends java.lang.Object
    Serial port settings used when opening a serial port.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      SerialPortSettings(BaudRate baudRate, DataBits dataBits, ParityBit parityBit, StopBits stopBits)
      Initializes a new instance of serial port settings using the specified baud rate, parity bit, data bits, and stop bits.
      SerialPortSettings(BaudRate baudRate, DataBits dataBits, ParityBit parityBit, StopBits stopBits, boolean isBlocked) 
      SerialPortSettings(BaudRate baudRate, DataBits dataBits, ParityBit parityBit, StopBits stopBits, boolean isBlocked, boolean isFlowCtr)

    • Constructor Detail

      • SerialPortSettings

        public SerialPortSettings(BaudRate baudRate,
                          DataBits dataBits,
                          ParityBit parityBit,
                          StopBits stopBits)
        Initializes a new instance of serial port settings using the specified baud rate, parity bit, data bits, and stop bits.
        Parameters:
        baudRate - Baud rate, see BaudRate
        dataBits - Data bits, see DataBits
        parityBit - Parity bit, see ParityBit
        stopBits - Stop bits, see StopBits
